title: Kitty Alpha build
description: Multi-phase autonomous build of the Kitty Alpha feature set, executed sequentially by KittyBuilder with operator-controlled merges.

packets.title: Journal keyword search endpoint
packets.objective: Add GET /journal/search to the FastAPI gateway that returns journal entries matching a keyword, ranked by recency, using the existing journal_store read path.
acceptance_criteria: GET /journal/search?q=<term> returns matching entries as JSON
Empty or missing q returns 422, not a 500
New tests cover match, no-match, and validation cases

packets.title: Journal search box in kitty-chat
packets.objective: Add a search input to the journal view in gateway/kitty-chat that calls /journal/search and renders results, with an empty-state message.
acceptance_criteria: Typing a term and pressing enter shows matching entries
No-results state renders a friendly message

packets.title: Document journal search
packets.objective: Document the journal search endpoint and UI in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and add a usage note to START_HERE.md.
acceptance_criteria: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md describes the endpoint, parameters, and data flow
START_HERE.md mentions the feature in one line
